about.title: A firm that grows with you
about.p1Rest: was born with the vocation of offering close, effective legal services at fair prices in the province of Alicante.
about.p2: Although we are currently a small firm, our vision is clear: to grow by incorporating the best professionals to continue offering personalized treatment with the capacity of a large firm.
about.p3: We believe that access to quality legal defense should not be a luxury. That is why we offer the most competitive prices in the area, with a free first consultation.

results.title: Results

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, analyze site traffic and personalize content. You can accept all, reject them or configure your preferences.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Essential for the site to function
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use the site
cookies.marketingDesc: Allow us to show personalized content
cookies.footnote: You can change your preferences at any time from the "Cookie settings" link in the footer.

chat.title: Legal Assistant
chat.subtitle: Avendaño Serrano Abogados
chat.greeting: Hello! I'm the virtual assistant of Avendaño Serrano Abogados. What legal topic would you like to learn about?
chat.continue: How would you like to continue? You can contact us directly or explore another topic.
chat.anotherIntro: Of course. What other legal topic would you like to learn about?
chat.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to receive legal advice.

familia.label: Family Law
familia.answer: We advise on divorces, separations, child custody, alimony and modifications of measures. Each family case is unique and requires a personalized strategy to protect your interests and those of your loved ones.

penal.label: Criminal Law
penal.answer: We defend you in any criminal proceeding: road safety offenses, injuries, economic crimes, domestic violence and more. 24h assistance at police stations and on-call courts.

civil.label: Civil Law
civil.answer: Monetary claims, contracts, inheritances, evictions, civil liability and property rights. We resolve civil disputes seeking the most efficient solution for you.

laboral.label: Labor Law
laboral.answer: Dismissals, salary claims, work accidents, disabilities, workplace harassment and collective bargaining. We defend your rights as an employee or advise your company.

extranjeria.label: Immigration
extranjeria.answer: Residence permits, Spanish nationality, family reunification, appeals against denials and roots. We accompany you throughout the entire administrative process.

mercantil.label: Commercial Law
mercantil.answer: Company formation, commercial contracts, claims between companies, bankruptcy proceedings and continuous advice for companies and self-employed.

otro.label: Other inquiry
otro.answer: We handle any legal inquiry. Contact us and we will tell you how we can help. The first consultation is always free and without commitment.

curriculum.name: Avendaño Serrano
curriculum.profileText: Practicing lawyer with a vocation for client service, specialized in immigration law, civil law and labor law. Founder of Avendaño Serrano Abogados, a firm committed to offering quality legal advice at affordable prices in the province of Alicante. Results-oriented and with strong negotiation and conflict-resolution skills.
curriculum.ctaText: Free first consultation. Tell us about your case and we will guide you with no commitment.
